parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify($('Escalation Logic').first().json.escalations.map(e => ({ day_num: e.day_num, task: e.task, level: e.level, created_at: new Date().toISOString() }))) }}

={
  "workflow": "WF06",
  "day_num": {{ $('Day Counter').first().json.day_number }},
  "direction": "outbound",
  "message_type": "escalation",
  "task": "{{ $('Escalation Logic').first().json.escalations.map(e => e.task).join(', ') }}",
  "ai_generated": true,
  "created_at": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}"
}
